name: 1'4"x2'4" Crosshatch Rectangle Outdoor Door Mat White - Room Essentials™
description:
Give your guests a warm and friendly welcome with this Crosshatch Rectangle Outdoor Doormat from Room Essentials™. The rectangular outdoor doormat features an allover white crosshatch pattern for an inviting look. Made with 100% coir and a latex back, this medium-pile doormat helps capture dirt and debris at your doorstep and is easy to shake clean when needed.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
